## Purpose
<!-- Why is this change needed? Link to any requirement, issue, or defect. -->

## Change Description
<!-- What was changed and how. Keep this focused on decisions that are not obvious from the diff. -->

## Test Evidence
<!-- What tests were added or modified to cover this change?
     For TDD: describe the red-green-refactor cycle if non-trivial. -->

## Areas Affected
<!-- Which modules, interfaces, or subsystems are touched? Note any impact on derived projects. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated to cover the change
- [ ] All CI checks pass (build, Clang build, sanitizers, coverage, clang-tidy, cppcheck, clang-format)
- [ ] 100% line and branch coverage maintained
- [ ] No new compiler warnings introduced
